# datahub_assertion (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub assertion by URN.

Use this to reference an assertion created outside Terraform -- for example via the DataHub UI or the `upsertCustomAssertion` API -- without taking ownership of it.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `urn` (String) Full assertion URN to look up (e.g. `urn:li:assertion:<uuid>`).

### Read-Only

- `assertion_type` (String) The assertion type as reported by DataHub (e.g. `FRESHNESS`, `VOLUME`, `SQL`, `CUSTOM`).
- `entity_urn` (String) URN of the DataHub dataset this assertion monitors.
